name: Winged Kuriboh LV9
name_jp: ハネクリボー <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＬＶ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レベル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>９
desc: Activate only as Chain Link 3 or higher (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. Spell Cards that have been activated are banished instead of being sent to the GY. The ATK/DEF of this card are each equal to the number of Spells in your opponent's GY x 500. You can only control 1 "Winged Kuriboh LV9".
mnst_eff: Activate only as Chain Link 3 or higher (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. Spell Cards that have been activated are banished instead of being sent to the GY. The ATK/DEF of this card are each equal to the number of Spells in your opponent's GY x 500. You can only control 1 "Winged Kuriboh LV9".
eff: Activate only as Chain Link 3 or higher (Quick Effect): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. Spell Cards that have been activated are banished instead of being sent to the GY. The ATK/DEF of this card are each equal to the number of Spells in your opponent's GY x 500. You can only control 1 "Winged Kuriboh LV9".

sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years Mega Pack

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes cards that would be sent to the Graveyard
